# --- R / RStudio ---
.Rproj.user/
.Rhistory
.RData
.Ruserdata
*.Rcheck/

# --- renv ---
# Keep renv.lock so others can restore your exact environment.
# Don't commit the renv library itself -- huge and platform-specific.
renv/library/
renv/local/
renv/cellar/
renv/lock/
renv/python/
renv/staging/

# --- Data ---
# Raw data is regenerated by 01_fetch_data.R. Don't commit it -- keeps repo
# small and avoids redistribution-license ambiguity. Processed is also
# regenerated.
data/raw/*
data/processed/*
!data/raw/.gitkeep
!data/processed/.gitkeep

# --- Rendered figures and decks ---
# Comment these lines out if you want rendered output committed for portfolio
# viewing convenience.
figures/*.png
!figures/.gitkeep
presentation_files/
presentation.html

# --- macOS / system noise ---
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
